title: Unable to override storage.conf with CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF env var in podman-remote
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

podman-remote v3.4.4 giving the warning:
`WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["storage.options.override_kernel_check"] from "/etc/containers/storage.conf".`

This is due to the machine having podman v1.6.4 installed. I expected to be able to override the storage conf file using `CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF`, but the warning is still seen.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Set `storage.options.override_kernel_check = true` in `/etc/containers/storage.conf`
2. Create a separate valid `storage.conf`
3. Run `CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF=storage.conf podman-remote -v`

**Describe the results you received:**
Warning on every `podman-remote` invocation due to always reading the old `/etc/containers/storage.conf`, can't be avoided using `CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF` env var.

**Describe the results you expected:**
Ability to stop podman-remote reading this config file at all using `CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF` env var.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
WARN[0000] Failed to decode the keys ["storage.options.override_kernel_check"] from "/etc/containers/storage.conf".
podman-remote version 3.4.4
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

System podman is the below, although I'm using static `podman-remote` binary.
```
podman-1.6.4-29.el7_9.x86_64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

I have searched online and in the issue tracker. I cannot easily try a newer version as there are no Linux static binaries available.

comments.body: Why does podman-remote even read the storage.conf? It should not need it.
It does not need it, but some of the libraries being used read it and this has leaked into podman-remote.

Well the is bad design and should be fixed, it looks like it as reaad in an init function which is very bad: https://github.com/containers/storage/blob/5019cd55275c44c606bc03edb363a4fe22d9d026/types/options.go#L33

We should not use init function for such things. init will be run every time the program starts regardless if it will be needed or not.
This issue is still seen on v4.1.1

> This issue is still seen on v4.1.1

Will be fixed with v4.2.0.
